calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Claim Escheated Property
Off Calendar May-28-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Tosaw for the Petitioner. Scott Chan for the State Controllers Office.

Mr. Towsaw stated that he had nothing to add. Mr. Chan submitted. The Court denied the petition stating that this was a case of mistaken identity. Mr. Chan will submit the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Handa.
